title: YOUTH CAMPS & OPPORTUNITIES - 211info
text: SEE YA LATER FOUNDATION YOUTH CAMPS & OPPORTUNITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers camps for various activities including basketball, football, soccer, baseball, music, and fishing. Also offers various youth competitions, such as bake-offs, gingerbread houses, Lego's, etc. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 434-1730 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 434-1730 Other (503) 964-9366 Waylon Zabriskie [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Sliding scale fee DOCUMENTS: Medical Release Forms AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - SCOTT BANKE ANNUAL MEMORIAL SCHOLARSHIP HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SEEDS OF HOPE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
